title: alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. graminifolium
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. graminifolium, also known as water plantain or Chinese water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Asia, belonging to the Alismataceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. graminifolium include its ability to help with edema, hypertension, and urinary disorders, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall cardiovascular health. Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. graminifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
